explanations.10: This function picks a random element from an array by generating a random index and returning that element.
explanations.11: This array stores the stages of a hangman drawing, where each index represents how many wrong guesses have been made, plus a string for displaying wrong guesses.
explanations.19: PHP_EOL is a constant that means 'end of line' — it's just a newline character that works on any operating system.
explanations.21: This loop checks each letter in the word: if it was guessed, it shows the letter, otherwise it shows an underscore.
explanations.25: The function ppnz() both prints the word AND returns it, so here we're capturing the return value to check if the player won.
